category_reason: system/internal signal or no positively user-visible signal (expected All 136 'validate null empty fields' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour, observed [api-tester-validate-null-empty-fields] TIMEOUT after 1800s)
sub_test: Aggregate failure: validate null empty fields (103/136 scenario checks failed)
title: [validate-null-empty-fields] Aggregate failure: validate null empty fields (103/136 scenario checks failed) on n/a — aggregate finding across endpoints — expected All 136 'validate null empty fields' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour, observed [api-tester-validate-null-empty-fields] TIMEOUT after 1800s (undocumented)
expected: All 136 'validate null empty fields' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour

testing_steps: 1. Start the target API at http://localhost:8899.
2. Write a script that POSTs http://localhost:8899/products/add and PUTs /products/1 with each required field null, empty-string and omitted, and each optional field null.
3. Assert required-field violations return 400 with a clear message and documented nullable optionals are accepted.
4. Compare your script's failures with the per-scenario evidence in TestCases/validate-null-empty-fields/cases.json — this run recorded 103 of 136 checks failing.

description: The validate-null-empty-fields check failed in aggregate against http://localhost:8899: [api-tester-validate-null-empty-fields] TIMEOUT after 1800s. The per-scenario evidence is in TestCases/validate-null-empty-fields/cases.json. There is no single reproducible API call — reproduce it with the script described in the steps below (which is also why this bug has no Postman section).
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Start the target API at http://localhost:8899.
2. Write a script that POSTs http://localhost:8899/products/add and PUTs /products/1 with each required field null, empty-string and omitted, and each optional field null.
3. Assert required-field violations return 400 with a clear message and documented nullable optionals are accepted.
4. Compare your script's failures with the per-scenario evidence in TestCases/validate-null-empty-fields/cases.json — this run recorded 103 of 136 checks failing.
